name: Missed Call Text-Back
description: Core pitch — automated text reply to missed callers after hours
email_body:
Hi {business_name},

Do you ever miss calls when your team is out on jobs? A lot of {industry} businesses lose those leads because the customer just calls the next number.

I set up a simple text-back line that replies to missed callers automatically so you can follow up instead of losing the job.

Happy to send a quick example if you're curious.

– Drew
social_dm_text: Hey {business_name} — quick question. Do you ever miss calls when your team is out on jobs? I set up a simple text-back line for {industry} businesses in {city} that replies to missed callers automatically. Happy to send a quick example — just let me know!
contact_form_text: Hi, I help {industry} businesses in {city} stop losing missed call leads after hours with a simple automated text-back system. Would love to send you a quick example. Thanks, Drew

name: Lead Capture Automation
description: Broader pitch — capture and respond to all new leads faster
email_body:
Hi {business_name},

Quick question — what happens when someone fills out your contact form or calls after hours and nobody responds for a few hours?

A lot of {industry} businesses in {city} lose jobs that way. I set up a simple lead capture system that responds immediately and notifies you so you can follow up fast.

Happy to show you how it works.

– Drew
social_dm_text: Hey {business_name} — do new leads ever fall through the cracks before you can call them back? I help {industry} businesses in {city} respond to new contacts automatically so no job gets lost. Happy to show you a quick example!
contact_form_text: Hi, I help {industry} businesses in {city} capture and respond to new leads faster using simple automation. Happy to show you how it works. Thanks, Drew

name: After-Hours Coverage
description: Target businesses that lose jobs outside business hours
email_body:
Hi {business_name},

Do you get calls after hours that go to voicemail? Most {industry} customers in {city} just call the next business if nobody answers.

I set up a lightweight after-hours coverage system — it texts back missed callers automatically and pings you so you can follow up first thing in the morning.

Worth a quick look?

– Drew
social_dm_text: Hey {business_name}! Do you lose jobs to voicemail after hours? I help {industry} businesses in {city} automatically text back missed callers so customers don't move on. Quick demo available — just ask!
contact_form_text: Hi, I help {industry} businesses in {city} cover after-hours missed calls with an automated text-back system. Happy to show you how it works. Thanks, Drew

name: Appointment No-Show Recovery
description: For businesses with appointments — reduce no-shows and recover cancellations
email_body:
Hi {business_name},

Do no-shows ever hit your schedule? Most {industry} businesses in {city} lose 10–20% of booked appointments to last-minute cancellations or no-shows with no follow-up.

I set up a simple automated reminder and reschedule flow that cuts that significantly. Happy to walk you through it.

– Drew
social_dm_text: Hey {business_name} — do no-shows or last-minute cancellations hurt your schedule? I help {industry} businesses in {city} reduce that with simple automated reminders and reschedule flows. Happy to show you a quick example!
contact_form_text: Hi, I help {industry} businesses in {city} reduce appointment no-shows and recover cancellations with simple automated reminders. Happy to show you how it works. Thanks, Drew
